subject: Congrats, you’re in. Ready?
body:
Hey, Alex here.

Welcome to the jungle.

Let's keep this simple.

- There's a big announcement coming soon.

As long as you're subscribed to my emails, you'll hear about it first.

- Below, you're about to get a new "secret chapter" that's only available in this email.

This secret chapter reveals things like:

- How to get people to engage with your stuff (who otherwise wouldn't). Whenever I get into a new market, I almost always start with this.

- How to make your advertising 9.5X as profitable. There are two things you need to pull this off (see page 5)

- The most powerful offer of all time (This will never expire)

- Five ways to add "hoops" that increase lead quality

- The 4 ways to display discounts.

There's a lot more, but this is a solid start on how to design a winning acquisition strategy.

Interested?

Reply "YES" now and I'll send you the secret chapter.

Let me know,

Alex
